## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI/layout change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or install workflow
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## UI Notes

For terminal UI changes, include a screenshot, terminal recording, or short description of the before/after behavior.

## Checklist

- [ ] This keeps the app read-only unless editing was explicitly in scope.
- [ ] Keyboard behavior is documented if changed.
- [ ] README or CONTRIBUTING updates are included when usage changes.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified.
